name: Life Lessons with Uramichi Oniisan
overview: Being an adult is hard, and for Uramichi Omota, that truth weighs on him. While on TV, he’s the upbeat exercise instructor for a children’s show, but he and his coworkers keep revealing the plight of adulthood on air. At least they’re working through it.

trailers.title: Life Lessons with Uramichi Oniisan | Official Trailer
